chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR N0.D-1828 0{ 2023 Date DCer with signature O٢ Judge Fur hearing of main case 06.03.2024 Mr, Abdul Naeem Pirzada Hdvocate for the Petitioner Mr Niaz Hussain Maitlo Advocate for Respondent University Mr Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, AAG ٠٠٦٠+ 7٦7٦+ Learned Counse representing the Respondent University has filed schedule of payment which is taken on record and submits that outstanding amount of commutation and LPR would be paid to the petitioner as per such schedule Counsel for the petitioner satisfied ٥٨٥ tnis petition accordingly disposed ofin terms of schedule of payment submitted by Counsel for the University However, default or non payment of said amount to the petitioner would exDOSe violator to tne contempt proceedings
